name: Robot Art Critic
description: Draw a named object under a strict stroke budget and iteratively adapt to a deterministic semantic recognizer.
natural_language: Draw the requested object until the robot recognizes it with sufficient confidence.

metadata.notes: The independent verifier replays timestamped pointer strokes, rasterizes them, extracts semantic occupancy/direction/moment/symmetry/radial/topology features, scores every class prototype, and ignores client acceptance, critique, and score claims.
